Class EntityRenderer

java.lang.Object
com.pot_pot_golf.Core.Rendering.EntityRenderer
All Implemented Interfaces:
IRenderer<Entity>
public class EntityRenderer extends Object implements IRenderer<Entity>
The class responsible for rendering the entities.
